itinerary.mapNote: Open savanna with first views of tepui walls rising from the plain. 1050m.
Approaching the wall. Camp directly below the vertical escarpment. 1300m.

itinerary.route: Base Camp to Summit via La Rampa
itinerary.mapNote: The only natural ramp. Dramatic climb to the otherworldly plateau. 2810m.
Explore the alien plateau: crystal fields, carnivorous plants, black rocks. 2810m.
Full descent day via La Rampa and savanna return. 1000m.

waypoints.name: Roraima Summit
waypoints.note: Ancient tepui plateau. Has been isolated for 2 billion years. Lost World.

waypoints.name: La Rampa
waypoints.note: The natural ramp — only non-technical ascent route onto the tepui.

waypoints.name: El Foso
waypoints.note: 'The Pit' — deep circular canyon cut into summit plateau.

waypoints.name: Triple Point
waypoints.note: Where Venezuela, Brazil and Guyana meet. Three countries summit.
